identity: Center for Neurovascular Engineering Research and adVanced Education (NERVE)

global_theme.description: Editorial academic layout combining a sophisticated off-white/cream base (for high legibility and federal/institutional trust) with deep navy anchor sections for contrast and rhythm. It uses subtle gold accents purely for editorial numbering and highlights. Awwwards-level polish via typography, whitespace, and motion, avoiding generic startup themes.

colors.usage_rules: Aggie Blue is the dominant brand anchor. Aggie Gold must be used SPARINGLY—only for editorial marks (e.g., '01', '02' chapter numbers), active states, and micro-interactions. The background defaults to 'editorial_cream' for reading sections and 'ncat_navy' or 'deep_void' for immersive/hero/footer sections.

typography.strategy: The 'Old Money Tech' (SaaS / Fintech / Research) archetype.

headings.usage: Use light/regular weights for massive, elegant headlines. Tight letter spacing (tracking-tighter) for massive text. H1s should scale fluidly up to text-6xl or text-7xl in hero sections.

body.usage: Clean geometric sans for readability. Use leading-relaxed for long-form research text.

mono.usage: Use for overlines, DOI links, publication dates, and data points. Tiny + Wide Spacing (tracking-[0.2em]) uppercase.

logo_and_motifs.logo_concept: A minimalist, side-profile brain outline rendered in clean SVG linework (Aggie Blue or White depending on background). The internal structure should feature a subtle, organic vascular/branching/tree pattern, symbolizing neurovascular engineering.
logo_and_motifs.background_motif: Take a segment of the brain's vascular branching pattern and use it as a massive, subtle SVG watermark/underlay (opacity 5%) in the background of key sections (e.g., Manifesto, Contact).

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing than standard designs. p-12, p-24, p-32 to create breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Use The 'Bento' Grid Protocol or Swiss Grid layout. Strong vertical columns. A 12-column grid where text may only occupy 6 columns, leaving the rest for negative space or high-impact clipped photography.

motion_and_interactions.hero_reveal: Signature on-load moment: Kinetic hero with a masked, line-by-line reveal of the main headline (using Framer Motion `clipPath` or `y: 100%` overflow-hidden reveals).
motion_and_interactions.scroll_effects: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling. Section scroll-reveals must be subtle (opacity and y-axis shift). Parallax on the hero background image or the brain motif.
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Hover states on research cards should feature a slow zoom on the background image (scale-105) and a slight shift of an arrow icon. Gold underline expansions for inline text links.

header.style: Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl, bg-white/80 or bg-ncat_navy/80 depending on scroll position) with a 1px delicate bottom border.
header.elements: Logo left. Nav links center: About, Research (Dropdown), Education, People, Publications, News, Facilities. CTA 'Contact' right.

hero.background: Deep NCAT Navy (#002147). Subtle moving 3D particle effect or slow-panning high-res lab image masked with bg-ncat_navy/70 overlay.
hero.content: Massive Fraunces headline: 'Pioneering Neurovascular Engineering.' Masked line-by-line reveal. Minimal mono-spaced overline 'NIH-FUNDED RESEARCH CENTER'.
hero.motif: Oversized, cropped brain/vascular SVG drawing rotating incredibly slowly in the background.

marquee.content: NEUROVASCULAR · ORGANOIDS · MICROFLUIDICS · MACHINE LEARNING · TRANSLATIONAL · IPSC · BRAIN-ON-CHIP
marquee.typography: font-mono, text-sm, tracking-widest, uppercase. Background: Aggie Blue, Text: Editorial Cream.

manifesto_chapters.design: Two-column staggered layout. Left column: Massive Gold number (e.g., '01', font-serif text-8xl). Right column: H3 heading and descriptive body text. Real photography in clipped, purposeful frames (aspect-square or aspect-portrait, not standard 16:9).

research_pillars.cards: Subtle border, no shadow (Technical Grid look). Hover lifts the card and changes border to Aggie Blue.
research_pillars.content: 1. Mini-Brain/Organoid. 2. Drug Delivery & Tissue Construct. 3. Advanced Imaging & ML. 4. Neurotechnology.
research_pillars.imagery: Use spotlight/vignette imagery inside the cards.

people_grid.layout: Director Bio (Dr. Yeoheung Yun) spans full width as a featured editorial block. Followed by a dense bento grid for other members.
people_grid.style: Black & white or duotone blue portraits that reveal full color on hover.

publications.layout: List-based, highly structured. Academic rigor over flash.
publications.elements: Filter by Year/Topic. Clean rows with Title, Authors, Journal, and a prominent 'DOI' button (mono font).

partnerships.layout: Logo strip, grayscale with low opacity (40%). On hover, opacity 100%. Logos: NIH, NCAT, Univ of Pittsburgh, WashU.

footer.content: Massive 'NERVE Center' text. Quick links. Critical: NIH funding acknowledgment statement in muted text.

admin_panel.layout: Functional/utilitarian. High-density grid (Mode B). Left sidebar nav, right content area.
admin_panel.tech: Shadcn UI tables, forms, and dialogs. Cloudinary widget for image uploads.

research_organoid.description: Close up of human brain structure

research_tissue.description: Close up view of blue substance/tissue

motif_reference.description: Brain on black background for wireframe reference

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Make it highly editorial, like a New York Times interactive feature mixed with a national laboratory.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. Do not add `.App { text-align: center; }`. Keep text left-aligned.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-button').
Use `sonner` for toasts in the admin panel.
Never use placeholder URLs (via.placeholder.com). Use the provided Cloudinary/Unsplash/Pexels image URLs.
Admin panel should use Shadcn UI components heavily. The public facing site should use raw Tailwind + Framer Motion for layouts and customized Shadcn only for complex interactions (dropdowns/forms).
